rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LINDA YEE LIN MA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 07/19/2022 by judicial officer. Notes emailed 6/10/2022 to attorney Amy Hespenheide with a requested confirmation the attorney received the notes. 1) Please prove the estate is entirely community property of Decedent. 2) The account must be amended to only include this estate's assets and cannot be a combined account that also includes the related matter #303208. 3) Decedent died 08/29/2016. Unclear when account begins as page 4 line 2-3 alleges the account begins 08/28/2016 the summary of account alleges the beginning assets on hand on 08/28/2016 and Schedule A alleges beginning assets on hand 08/29/2016. A personal representative's account must begin with the date of death of the decedent. (See LRSF 14.34). 4) Petition must be signed and verified by Petitioner. All pleadings filed in proceedings under the Probate Code must be verified. If two or more persons join in a pleading, it may be verified by any of them. (See CRC 7.103). 5) The petition alleges the I&A value of $601,834.77 contains all the assets of Decedent's ancillary probate estate. Please file a memorandum of points and authorities in support of the account beginning with $1,203,669.54 as accounts must begin with the I&A values. 6) Please clarify the amount of reimbursement as there appear to be two different amounts. Please explain and file an itemized request for all alleged owed expenses to Executor. Please address Probate Code 9252. 7) Local Rule 14.57 B says mileage and parking are absorbed as part of fees. It appears the "travel fees" on disbursements totaling $1,747.25 must be paid back to the estate and a receipt filed. 8) The petition alleges the account period ends 08/28/2018. The 11/04/2021 Declaration has a bank statement from April 22, 2016 to May 20, 2016. Please verify the balance at the end of the account period. See LRSF 14.34 D. The ending balance of assets in interim and final accounts filed by fiduciaries, who are not financial institutions, must be verified. Verification is made by original bank or brokerage statements or original bank letters signed by a bank officer with the authority to sign, showing the vesting of the account, the date, and the amount of the balance. Photocopies are not acceptable. See CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MATTHEW SHUI SANG MA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/21/2022 for repeated failures to file a response to Examiner notes. Matter may be continued again to the same date as PES-19-303207. Examiner Notes: a. Please prove the estate is entirely community property of Decedent. b. The petition page 1 line 23 alleges Linda Yee Lina Ma died testate when the Decedent is Matthew Shui Sang Ma. c. Decedent died 08/29/2016. Unclear when account begins as page 1 line 21 alleges the account begins 08/28/2016, page 4 line 2 alleges the account begins 08/28/2018, the summary of account alleges the beginning assets on hand on 08/28/2016 and Schedule A alleges beginning assets on hand 08/29/2016. A personal representative's account must begin with the date of death of the decedent. (See LRSF 14.34). d. Petition must be signed and verified by Petitioner. All pleadings filed in proceedings under the Probate Code must be verified. If two or more persons join in a pleading, it may be verified by any of them. (See CRC 7.103). e. The petition alleges the I&A value of $601,834.77 contains all the assets of Decedent's ancillary probate estate. Please amend the account to begin with the I&A value or file a memorandum of points and authorities in support of the account beginning with $1,203,669.54. f. Please explain and file receipts for all $8,477.38 in alleged owed expenses to Executor. Please address Probate Code 9252. g. Please explain on schedule D - Disbursements Appraisal of 300 Berry St., Unit 1108 for $350.00 and file a receipt. Please address Probate Code 8900 et seq and why this appraisal was necessary when the court appointed a probate referee. h. Local Rule 14.57 B says mileage and parking are absorbed as part of fees. It appears the "travel fees" on disbursements totaling $1,747.25 must be paid back to the estate and a receipt filed. i. Please explain and file a receipt for 01/18/2018 Tenant Search Fees Adam Savick for $2,300.00. j. The petition alleges the account period ends 08/28/2018. The 11/04/2021 Declaration has a bank statement from April 22, 2016 to May 20, 2016. Please verify the balance at the end of the account period. See LRSF 14.34 D. The ending balance of assets in interim and final accounts filed by fiduciaries, who are not financial institutions, must be verified. Verification is made by original bank or brokerage statements or original bank letters signed by a bank officer with the authority to sign, showing the vesting of the account, the date, and the amount of the balance. Photocopies are not acceptable. See CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT PIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Neither a petition for final distribution nor a report of status with a petition for additional time to administer the estate has been filed yet. Letters were issued on 6/15/21, although the executor was appointed on 12/9/20. [Prob. C. Sect. 12200.] The I&A was just filed on 5/16/22, much later than required by law. [Prob. C. Sect. 8800(b).] (Item 4 of an I&A should not be completed when a Probate Referee has been appointed. Continued premiums for the $20,000 bond should not have been necessary, had the estate closed timely within a year.) Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review the 11th amended general order on the court's website for information on appearing remotely. For Zoom appearance: Meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING MUST CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JUANITA M. AGUILERA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) No petition for final distribution or for approval of a report of status of administration has been filed since letters were issued on 06/08/2021. In February 2022, the administrator filed a declaration to report the status of administration, without paying a filing fee and receiving a new hearing date from the clerk. 2) No personal representative has been appointed for the estate of the decedent's surviving spouse. It is unclear whether the estate assets are community property or separate property, as the final invenotry and appraisal on file does not show the property characterization. Probate Code section 8850(c). 3) The administrator has not acted on any creditor claim on file. No DE-174 form has been filed to show the administrator's allowance or rejection of each claim. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 11th Amended General Order which took effect on 04/25/2022 and LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/13/22. Courtesy copies of pleadings addressing issues posted for the 5/24/22 hearing were not received by the deadline (or even as of 6/9/22). Courtesy copies of responsive pleadings must be received by the assigned examiner by no later than 7/1/22 to avoid another continuance. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CARLOS FELICIANO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/10/2022 per counsel's request (via e-mail on 06/08/2022). Additional notes were e-mailed to counsel on 06/08/2022.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DANIEL GARCIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 07/05/2022 (no earlier date available). Exhibit A attached to the petition indicates that the decedent's 401(k) distribution was made to a rollver IRA. Please identify the designated beneficiary of the IRA and provide a copy of the IRA account statement received from Charles Schwab. Note: Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE HERMAN F. JOHNSON, SR. REVOCABLE 2010 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming That An Interest In The Real Property Commonly Known As 163 Beverly Street, San Francisco, California, Is An Asset Of
rulings.Rulings: hearing. apperance required for the court to take a first look at the pleadings. the parties may be asked if they are interested in participating in the pro bono mediation program. Remote appearance strongly recommended. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/13/22. No response. Courtesy copies of and pleadings addressing issues posted for the 5/24/22 hearing must be received by the assigned examiner by no later than 7/1/22 to avoid another continuance. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JACQUELINE DAWN HARRIS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status hearing on close of estate set for 06/20/2023. BOnd is fixed at $146,000.00. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: continued to june 28, 2022 for hearing on bond v limited authority.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CARY HEATER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report of status of administration must be filed by 06/26/2023. If not on file, appearance required at status hearing set for 07/11/2023.
